race.description: Summerset Retirement Village Cranbourne North Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: ILLUMINANCE (4) resumes. She's a bit maligned this girl having run second 10 times from 21 starts for only 2 wins but she races well fresh and has run very well in better company. Comes up each way odds here and that is probably the way to play given her consistency. JEWEL BAY (1) doesn't win out of turn but is going okay and rising to 1400m now off a solid run at Mornington looks to suit. GOLDEN SPRITZ (2) comes through a strong Class 1 won by Clevor Trever and should be ready to peak third up from a perfect draw. HONEY MAKER (8) performed well last start when third at Sale over 1400m in the wet. Rates an each-way chance.
